description: Perimeter Acquisition Corp. I does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. The company was incorporated in 2025 and is based in Dallas, Texas.
